title: lathyrus venetus subsp. banaticus
intro: Lathyrus venetus subsp. banaticus, also known as the Banatic pea, is a subspecies of the Lathyrus venetus plant, belonging to the legume family and native to parts of Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and reduce inflammation, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, Lathyrus venetus subsp. banaticus has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
